routing_reasons.rationale: IF/ELSE control flow requires LLM-assisted branch enumeration to identify both conditional paths.

statements.sql: INSERT INTO silver.IfElseTarget (ProductAlternateKey, EnglishProductName, PriceCategory) SELECT CAST(ProductID AS NVARCHAR(25)), ProductName, 'Premium' FROM bronze.Product WHERE ListPrice > 100
INSERT INTO silver.IfElseTarget (ProductAlternateKey, EnglishProductName, PriceCategory) SELECT CAST(ProductID AS NVARCHAR(25)), ProductName, 'Standard' FROM bronze.Product

refactor.extracted_sql: -- When target table has records: UPDATE branch SELECT CAST(src.ProductID AS NVARCHAR(25)) AS ProductAlternateKey, src.ProductName AS EnglishProductName, CAST(NULL AS NVARCHAR(20)) AS PriceCategory FROM [bronze].[Product] AS src WHERE EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM [silver].[IfElseTarget]) UNION ALL -- When target table is empty: INSERT branch SELECT CAST(ProductID AS NVARCHAR(25)) AS ProductAlternateKey, ProductName AS EnglishProductName, CAST(NULL AS NVARCHAR(20)) AS PriceCategory FROM [bronze].[Product] WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM [silver].[IfElseTarget])
refactor.refactored_sql: WITH import_product AS ( SELECT * FROM [bronze].[Product] ), check_target_records AS ( SELECT COUNT(*) AS record_count FROM [silver].[IfElseTarget] ), has_records AS ( SELECT CASE WHEN record_count > 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS has_records_flag FROM check_target_records ), update_branch AS ( SELECT CAST(src.ProductID AS NVARCHAR(25)) AS ProductAlternateKey, src.ProductName AS EnglishProductName, CAST(NULL AS NVARCHAR(20)) AS PriceCategory FROM import_product AS src INNER JOIN [silver].[IfElseTarget] AS tgt ON tgt.ProductAlternateKey = CAST(src.ProductID AS NVARCHAR(25)) WHERE (SELECT has_records_flag FROM has_records) = 1 ), insert_branch AS ( SELECT CAST(ProductID AS NVARCHAR(25)) AS ProductAlternateKey, ProductName AS EnglishProductName, CAST(NULL AS NVARCHAR(20)) AS PriceCategory FROM import_product WHERE (SELECT has_records_flag FROM has_records) = 0 ), final AS ( SELECT ProductAlternateKey, EnglishProductName, PriceCategory FROM update_branch UNION ALL SELECT ProductAlternateKey, EnglishProductName, PriceCategory FROM insert_branch ) SELECT * FROM final
